name: @gjsify/example-dom-three-geometry-shapes
description: Three.js geometry shapes example ported from refs/three/examples/webgl_geometry_shapes.html

scripts.build: yarn build:gjs && yarn build:browser && yarn build:assets
scripts.build:assets: cp -f src/browser/index.html dist/index.html && cp -f src/browser/webgl.css dist/webgl.css && cp -f src/uv_grid_opengl.jpg dist/uv_grid_opengl.jpg

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
